title: Purification of DNA from Whole Blood using QIAamp Blood Midi Kit and Qubit QC
author: Paula Saffie
materials: Pipet 200 µL QIAGEN Protease into the bottom of a 15 ml centrifuge tube. Add 2 mL Sample and mix briefly.

steps.title: STANDARDIZE THE QUBIT (every time you...
steps.instruction: STANDARDIZE THE QUBIT (every time you use it or once a week according to lab protocol)

steps.title: In one strip, add 10 mL of BR Standard 1
steps.instruction: In one strip, add 10 mL of BR Standard 1.

steps.title: In the other strip, add 10...
steps.instruction: In the other strip, add 10 mL of BR Standard 2.

steps.title: Add 190 µL of the working...
steps.instruction: Add 190 µL of the working solution to all of the tubes.

steps.title: Vortex, spin down, and incubate in...
steps.instruction: Vortex, spin down, and incubate in the dark for about 2 min to optimize the reaction.

steps.title: Add 2 µL or 1 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 2 µL or 1 µL of Sample thoroughly mixed (flick + spin down) in the Qubit tube ( 200 µL total amount )

steps.title: Pulse-vortex and spin down
steps.instruction: Pulse-vortex and spin down. Incubate in dark for at least 2min.

steps.title: Load the tube strip containing the samples as shown
steps.instruction: Load the tube strip containing the samples as shown. If you have fewer than 8 samples, press to deselect the tube positions that do not contain a sample.

steps.title: In the Sample volume screen enter the sample volume used
steps.instruction: In the Sample volume screen enter the sample volume used: it could be 1 µL or 2 µL .

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.4 mL Buffer AL , and mix thoroughly by inverting the tube 15 times, followed by additional vigorous shaking for at least 1 min (Check that the tubes are tightly closed).

steps.title: Add 2 mL ethanol (96–100%) to...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL ethanol (96–100%) to the sample, and mix by inverting the tube 10 times, followed by additional vigorous shaking.

steps.title: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge 3000 rpm, °C, (1850 x g) for 3min.

steps.title: Carefully transfer (just squirt solution in...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer (just squirt solution in middle of the membrane, don't need to go inside the tube with the tip) one half (aprox 2-3 mL ) of the solution onto the QIAamp Midi column placed in a 15 ml centrifuge tube, cerefully not to moistening the rim .

steps.title: Incubate at 70 °C 10 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 70 °C 10 min. (During this time, store Protease in the fridge)

steps.title: Add 2 mL Buffer AW1 (carefully,...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL Buffer AW1 (carefully, without moistening the rim) to the QIAamp Midi column.

steps.title: Remove the QIAamp Midi column, discard...
steps.instruction: Remove the QIAamp Midi column, discard the filtrate , and place the QIAamp Midi column back into the 15 ml centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Remove the QIAamp Midi column, discard...
steps.instruction: Remove the QIAamp Midi column, discard the filtrate (dab the rim to remove any exccess of liquid), and place the QIAamp Midi column back into the 15 ml centrifuge tube. Load the remainder of the solution onto the QIAamp Midi column.

steps.title: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge 3000 rpm, °C, (1850 x g) for 3min.

steps.title: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, (4500 x g) for 15 min.

steps.title: Add 2 mL Buffer AW2 (carefully,...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL Buffer AW2 (carefully, without moistening the rim) to the QIAamp Midi column.

steps.title: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge...
steps.instruction: With the cap tightly closed, centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, ( 4500 x g) for 1 min.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 min .

steps.title: Pipet 300 µL Buffer AE directly...
steps.instruction: Pipet 300 µL Buffer AE directly onto the membrane of the QIAamp Midi column and close the cap.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp Midi column in...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp Midi column in a clean 15 ml centrifuge tube , and discard the collection tube containing the filtrate.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, (4500...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, (4500 x g) for 2 min.

steps.title: Pipet 300 µL Buffer AE directly...
steps.instruction: Pipet 300 µL Buffer AE directly onto the membrane of the QIAamp Midi column and close the cap.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, (4500...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm, °C, (4500 x g) for 2 min.

steps.title: On the Home screen, press to...
steps.instruction: On the Home screen, press to select the Assay to perform ( dsDNA )

steps.title: Press Read standards & run samples to read new standards
steps.instruction: Press Read standards & run samples to read new standards

steps.title: When prompted, load the Qubit‱ Flex...
steps.instruction: When prompted, load the Qubit‱ Flex Tube Strip containing Standard #1 into the sample chamber, then press Run standards. The reading takes ~3 seconds.

steps.title: When prompted, load the Qubit‱ Flex...
steps.instruction: When prompted, load the Qubit‱ Flex Tube Strip containing Standard #2 into the sample chamber, then press Run standards. The reading takes ~3 seconds.

steps.title: If your calibration is successful, press...
steps.instruction: If your calibration is successful, press Next to proceed to “Read samples” or begin in this step if it is already calibrated.

steps.title: Add 198 µL or 199 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 198 µL or 199 µL of dsDNA Broad Range Working Solution to a 0.2 mL Qubit tube.

steps.title: Press Output sample units to open...
steps.instruction: Press Output sample units to open the Output Units screen, then select the desired units. Press Next to go to the Sample volume screen. Select the units accordingly

steps.title: Press Run samples
steps.instruction: Press Run samples. The reading takes approximately 3 seconds.

steps.title: To display the results in list...
steps.instruction: To display the results in list view, press the Graph button to hide the graph. The Results screen shows the concentration of each original sample in a list form, using the output units selected at the beginning of the assay. On average, the Midi kit yields about 20-30 micrograms of DNA per sample. In this example, you can find this quantity by multiplying the Qubit concentration (104 nanograms per microliter) by the sample volume (550 microliters), then dividing the result by 1000. In this case, it equals 57.20 %s %s
